title: Analytics Engineer (LookML)
preferredSkills: Advanced certifications in analytics or BI tools
educationRequired: Undergraduate degree in a related discipline (e.g., Computer Science, Statistics, Analytics, Mathematics, Engineering, Economics) or equivalent experience.
keyResponsibilities: Own a curated catalog of business metrics and KPIs.
Design, build, and automate dashboards and reports in Power BI and Looker.
Conduct in-depth analysis to identify trends, drivers, and opportunities.
Model, query, and transform data using SQL.
Collaborate with Data Science to support experiments and track ML/Al outcomes.
Document analytical logic, KPI definitions, data lineage, and assumptions.
Recommend and adopt improvements that enhance reliability, performance, or usability.

companyResearch.recentNews: KUBRA is a fast-growing company that delivers customer communications solutions to some of the largest utility, insurance, and government entities across North America. KUBRA offers billing and payments, mapping, mobile apps, proactive communications, and artificial intelligence solutions for customers. With more than 1.5 billion customer interactions annually, KUBRA services reach over 40% of households in the U.S. and Canada. KUBRA is an operating subsidiary of Hearst.
companyResearch.culture: Equitable, inclusive, and inspiring workplace. Casual work environment, competitive compensation and a stellar benefits program. Values productivity, focus and self-motivation. Offers employee recognition programs, mental health support, refreshed beverage stations, and Perkopolis retail discounts.
